items.title: Five-month-old girl starves to death in Gaza, the latest death from starvation
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>On a sunny street in shattered Gaza, the bundle containing Zainab Abu Halib represented the latest death from starvation after 21 months of war and Israeli restrictions on aid. (AP video by Mariam Daqqa).

#israel #gaza 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Trump plays golf in Scotland while protesters take to the streets
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump played golf Saturday at his course on Scotland's coast while protesters around the country took to the streets to decry his visit and accuse U.K. leaders of pandering to the American. Trump is set to talk trade with the British Prime Minister and the European Commission president.

#trump #scotland 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Raul Castro, 94, celebrates attack that opened the way for Cuban Revolution
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Revolutionary leader Raúl Castro, 94, accompanied by Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel, arrived at Ciego de Avila's Plaza Saturday to kick off the 72nd anniversary celebrations of the Moncada Barracks assault with thousands of people. The anniversary coincides with a period of economic stress, one of the worst in decades, marked by food shortages, power outages, dollarization, and high inflation, which are fueling a wave of emigration. (AP Video shot by: Ariel Fernández and Milexsy Durán).

#raulcastro #cuba 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Passenger recounts Southwest Airlines flight plunging to avoid aircraft
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A Southwest Airline jet heading to Las Vegas from Southern California took a dramatic plunge shortly after takeoff Friday in response to an alert about a nearby plane, sending some passengers flying out of their seats and injuring two flight attendants. 

#southwestairlines

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>At least 25 people were killed by Israeli airstrikes and gunshots in the Gaza Strip overnight into Saturday, according to the Palestinian territory's health officials and the ambulance service.

items.title: Cambodians displaced by violence with Thailand crowd a water truck
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Oddar Meanchey, one of the Cambodian provinces sharing the country’s roughly 800-kilometer border with Thailand, has witnessed a lot of the fighting in the ongoing Thailand-Cambodia clash that has displaced thousands of people and killed dozens. ( AP video by Anton L. Delgado).

#cambodia #thailand

items.title: Trump ignores questions from journalists as he plays golf in Scotland
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>U.S. President Donald Trump ignored questions from journalists as he played a round of golf at a Scottish resort on Saturday morning. A Sky News journalist was heard asking Trump, "Mr Trump, are you enjoying the Scottish hospitality? Can you escape the Jeffrey Epstein crisis?" referring to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Questions over Trump’s past ties with Epstein and secret files related to him have dogged the administration despite the president being otherwise at the height of his political influence.

#trump #scotland 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: UK's Keir Starmer says 'humanitarian catastrophe' in Gaza must end
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has said that the "humanitarian catastrophe" in Gaza must end. His comments followed a move by the leaders of Britain, France and Germany to demand Israel allow unrestricted aid into Gaza.

#gaza #keirstarmer #starmer

items.title: US fertility at an all-time low in 2024
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The fertility rate in the U.S. dropped to an all-time low in 2024 with less than 1.6 kids per woman, new federal data released shows.

It has been sliding for close to two decades as more women are waiting longer to have children or never taking that step at all.

#shorts #fertility #us #babies</article>
